title: Tide Pool Biodiversity Survey: Uniform Microhabitat Sampling
strategies: space-diagonal / single-line placement: all quadrats on the main diagonal of the cube (matches the checker baseline, high 3D star discrepancy ~0.1)
3D Halton set: coordinate j = radical inverse in prime base (2,3,5); a reliable fixed low-discrepancy construction that beats the diagonal

best Korobov rank-1 lattice: sweep the generator g over 1..n-1 for points ((i+.5)/n, (i*g mod n +.5)/n, (i*g^2 mod n +.5)/n) and keep the g with minimum EXACT 3D star discrepancy (a real per-instance search beating any single fixed rule)
jittered/stratified strata, scrambled Halton, Fibonacci/Sobol lattices, or local-search coordinate perturbation of a good seed set
